publications.title: WorldSpeech: A Multilingual Speech Corpus from Around the World
publications.authors: A. Asonitis, L. A. Lanzendörfer, F. Berdoz, R. Wattenhofer
publications.description: 65k hours across 80+ languages, sourced from government proceedings, international broadcasts and public-domain audiobooks. 100k+ HuggingFace downloads and #1 trending in its first month of release.
